review: 1.10.0-RC4b interest-routed mesh broadcast — adversarial implementation review before cut
method: 3 lenses (transport-correctness, wiring-gating, spec-fidelity-regression) + skeptic verify + synthesis; 4 agents

verdict.note: All load-bearing claims spot-verified against the tree: publish() genuinely interest-routes (prunes uninterested peers; null/reserved/read-failure ⇒ all-peers); mesh.enable=false and interest-routing.enable=false byte-identical paths untouched; full reactor 617 tests / 11 modules / 0 skips green.

findingsAllMinor_7deduped_ALL_FOLDED_bef.title: setInterestRegistry javadoc was a copy-paste of the room-registry doc (and displaced setRoomRegistry's doc)
findingsAllMinor_7deduped_ALL_FOLDED_bef.fix: interest-specific javadoc on setInterestRegistry + restored room javadoc on setRoomRegistry (ClusterMessageSender)

findingsAllMinor_7deduped_ALL_FOLDED_bef.title: MeshBroker class javadoc still said 'publish is naive — all peers ... interest routing is RC4b' (future tense)
findingsAllMinor_7deduped_ALL_FOLDED_bef.fix: promoted to implemented: publish is interest-routed when a router is wired, all-peers fallback otherwise (MeshBroker)

findingsAllMinor_7deduped_ALL_FOLDED_bef.title: MeshInterestRouter.onNodeLeft async-error visibility — removeAllForNode's async failure dropped silently (sync catch is dead for the real failure mode)
Missing R6 dead-node onNodeLeft test (cache clear + registry reap)
Missing reserved-channel (R2) pruning-bypass test at the broker level (MeshInterestRoutingTest used an empty reserved set)
findingsAllMinor_7deduped_ALL_FOLDED_bef.fix: MeshInterestRoutingTest.reservedChannel_bypassesPruning_allPeersReceive (router with reserved={uri}, empty interest, B still receives)

findingsAllMinor_7deduped_ALL_FOLDED_bef.title: E2E omitted the spec §9 unsubscribe→retract transition
findingsAllMinor_7deduped_ALL_FOLDED_bef.fix: extended MeshTwoNodeE2ETest interest E2E: after B's last /ws/x session leaves + ≤TTL, A no longer targets B

findingsAllMinor_7deduped_ALL_FOLDED_bef.title: Missing symmetric OnAnyRedisSpiRequired (R3) over-retain test (custom directory + custom interest registry ⇒ Redis gated off)

postFold: Cluster module folded tests green (MeshInterestRouterTest 4, MeshInterestRoutingTest 2, MeshTwoNodeE2ETest 2); starter context tests 38 green. All 7 backlog items folded into the cut rather than deferred to RC4c (project fold-before-cut culture), several directly testing the folded BLOCKERs (R2 reserved bypass, R3 symmetric clause, R6 onNodeLeft).
